title: The Impulses.
content:
Fear with his iron staff may urge the slave onward forever;
    Rapture, do thou lead me on ever in roseate chains!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "The Impulses.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
